## utm-dev package

Package built applications for distribution

### Synopsis

Create distribution packages from built applications. Takes apps from .bin/ and creates packages in .dist/

```
utm-dev package [platform] [app-directory] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for package
```

* [utm-dev](utm-dev.md)	 - Build cross-platform hybrid apps with Go
